name: Arizona Silver Exploration Inc.
summary: Arizona Silver Exploration Inc. engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties. The company holds 100% interests in the Ramsey Mine silver project that covers an area of approximately 1,000 acres located in La Paz County, Arizona; and the Sycamore Canyon gold-silver project situated in Graham County, Arizona. It also has 100% interests in the Carlin-type gold exploration property that consists of 77 unpatented lode mining claims totalling approximately 1540 acres located in Nye County, Nevada; and the Philadelphia gold and silver property located in Mohave County, Arizona. The company was formerly known as Damon Capital Corp. and changed its name to Arizona Silver Exploration Inc. in November 2016. The company was incorporated in 2011 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
